_comment: Milo-flavor substrate. Unlike the EDS flavor it does NOT replace head.html / scripts/scripts.js / styles/styles.css / header+footer blocks — that would rip out Milo's runtime, which is what loads the live global-navigation + footer from page metadata. It ADDS project-local blocks that Milo auto-loads from codeRoot: (1) the overlay block (blocks/snowflake) for the page-level path; (2) the scroll-animation runtime (blocks/animation + tools/page-animator/controls.js, vendored from milo@page-animator-poc) so --pa-* animation sidecars run on the deployed page and stay adjustable in the page-animator panel. Chrome is owned by Milo.

marker._comment: Presence of the overlay block is the install marker for the Milo flavor.

replace.purpose: Milo overlay block: resolves template name, fetches /templates/<t>.html, lifts its <link>s, loads /styles/<t>.css, applies DA slot overrides, replaces <main>. Leaves <header>/<footer> to Milo.
Minimal; hides the (consumed) authoring block. The overlaid body carries its own styles.

Scroll-animation sidecar block (vendored from milo@page-animator-poc). Reads --pa-*/range-*/timing-* rows from a `<div class="animation {target}">` sibling, finds the target by class name (works for bespoke forge-* blocks), injects a CSS scroll-driven animation, stamps data-pa-* for the page-animator panel, then hides itself.
No-op stylesheet (the block hides itself in JS; animation CSS is generated per-animId).

Dependency of blocks/animation: the --pa-* param model + buildCssRule + generateAnimId (vendored from milo@page-animator-poc). Same vocabulary the page-animator panel reads/writes, so emitted animation sidecars are adjustable.

ignorePatches.purpose: Per-template animation engines are vendored verbatim from the source.

lines: # Per-template CSS is vendor — extracted verbatim from the source.
# Ignore everything in styles/ except the repo's own boilerplate files.
ignorePatches.purpose: Skip per-template CSS files (vendored from source).

lines: # Snowflake skill: in-progress run state (committed only on close)
gitignore.purpose: Avoid churn from mid-run state.json writes; closed runs rename to state.json.closed and commit.
